en: Weather in the north: Sun and frost replace storms after Easter. While it initially remains stormy on Easter Monday, the wind decreases in the new week. Sun and frost will alternate in the coming days.

The booking situation in the winter sports resorts is still good and the recent onset of winter has resulted in some short-term bookings, according to industry representatives. However, in some accommodations one would have hoped that this would result in even more reservations…
la: Nix ante Pascha affert ligula. In magna rerum condicione in ludis hiemalibus frequentatur, adhuc bonum est et recens impetus hiemis consecutus est in nonnullis brevibus temporis libellis, secundum industriam repraesentativis. Sed in aliquibus accommodationibus optaverimus hoc eventurum etiam magis reservationes.
